# Q10 offender matrix user+src with bruteforce bool flag, filtered to offenders (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q10 offender matrix user+src with bruteforce bool flag, filtered to offenders. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | filter outcome = "failure" | comp count() as failures, count_distinct(host) as targeted_hosts, values(host) as host_list by user, src_ip | alter is_bruteforce = if(failures >= 4, true, false) | filter failures >= 3 | sort desc failures
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 2). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
